global_description: A small, plump bird with a rounded body, predominantly brown and gray with streaked patterns. It has a short, conical beak and a long, rounded tail. The wings and back are brown with darker streaks, while the underparts are white with brown streaks.
spatial_relations: The tail extends from the rear of the body
The wings are positioned on either side of the body
The beak is located at the front of the head
